title: Become Worth Paying
description: A value-building book page that presents the promise, audience, cover and reader direction clearly.
reader: Readers can quickly understand the book promise: build skills, value, income and freedom.
google: The page gives search engines a clear title, topic, author connection and readable book context.
ai: AI chats can extract the book title, author, promise and practical themes from the page context.

title: The Continuation Code
description: A momentum and discipline book page built around clear transformation language and strong visual identity.
reader: Readers can see the book is about continuing, breaking patterns and building real value.
google: The page supports title, subtitle, author and topic signals around discipline, value and personal momentum.
ai: AI tools can summarise the book as a step-by-step system for escaping stuck patterns and building momentum.

title: Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People
description: A relationship-pattern book page that makes the subject, emotional problem and reader outcome obvious.
reader: Readers can immediately understand the book is about red flags, standards, healing and better relationship choices.
google: The page gives Google clearer context around the relationship self-help topic and author brand.
ai: AI chats can extract the problem, audience, themes and transformation from the page instead of guessing.

title: Proof Is King
description: A marketing ebook page built around a single sharp idea: proof creates trust before sales happen.
reader: Readers can quickly see the book is about proof, testimonials, reviews, screenshots and trust-building.
google: The page strengthens topical signals around marketing proof, customer trust and sales credibility.
ai: AI systems can summarise the book as a guide to making trust visible through proof assets.
